title: Dimensional
description: A quest based, dimension hopping adventure with Immersive Portals
body:
# Dimensional

Unexpectedly, you were transported away from your home in The End and now need to find your way back. Thankfully your Q.U.E.S.T Book will guide you.

## Pack Description

After selecting an end-related origin, you will embark on a journey across across 10 different dimensions before finally reaching The End. This pack heavily utilizes Immersive Portals and is intended to be a relatively short pack showcasing various mods that add new dimensions. It's a lightweight pack with less than 80 mods but Immersive Portals may cause frame drops on some computers. 

### Pack Background

I mostly made this pack for myself for the following reasons:
 - I wanted to test out the Heracles quest mod 
 - I wanted to teach myself how to add my own custom dimensions using only a datapack
 - I wanted to actually play with the Immersive Portals mod since it is often not included in packs due to conflicts with other mods

I decided to release it for others to enjoy but don't expect many updates to this pack, if you run into issues you'll probably have to solve them yourself.

### Other Packs
If you're interested in other modpacks I've made checkout my modrinth profile [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Mules)
